'''Dead Bantha Gulch''' was the name of a ravine on the desert [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] and [[Tru'eb Cholakk]] hid out within the crevasse after their escape from the [[Slavery/Legends|slave lord]] [[Quintik Kahr]]. At the bottom of the gulch lay a [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] skeleton, which inspired them to give the fissure its name. The canyon was large enough to fit several [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] within, preventing them from being detected from the air; it also contained a number of large caverns. The native [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] and [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] kept clear of the area.

Okeefe and Tru'eb arranged to meet there around four months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in order to exchange cargoes. However, [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Birket]] of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] captured Cholakk and set a trap for Okeefe in the ravine. While she was initially captured, the two smugglers managed to escape from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] custody with the help of Okeefe's understudy, [[Darrik]].

==Behind the scenes==
Dead Bantha Gulch was slated to appear in the Smuggler's Log entry in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 16|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 16]], however the Journal was canceled.
